MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON DEC-22-2022 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. DANIEL DEL RIO, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. KERI SALET, ESQ, APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/30/23 IS CONTINUED TO 9/25/23 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRE-TRIAL AND DISCOVERY DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR AT TRIAL. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL IS WAIVED BY PARTIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT CONFORMS TO THE COURT'S RULING AND SHOULD BE APPROVED AS TO FORM. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-15-2023 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY KERI SALET, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT JOHN TROTTER; DANIEL R. DEL RIO, ESQ. (VIA COURTCALL) FOR PLAINTIFF PAUL MULDROW -- DEFENDANT JOHN TROTTER'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/25/23 IS CONTINUED TO 3/25/24 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THIS IS THE FINAL CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE. DISCOVERY AND ALL DEADLINES SHALL BE BASED ON THE NEW TRIAL DATE AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS ATTY. SALET TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE BY 4:00 PM TODAY FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO OBTAIN THE 3/25/24 TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
